LanguageData.Ammo_50mmType89MortarShell_HE.label: 50mm type 89 mortar shell (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_50mmType89MortarShell_HE.descriptio: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.

LanguageData.Ammo_50mmType89MortarShell_EMP.descripti: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Ammo_50mmType89MortarShell_Smoke.label: 50mm type 89 mortar shell (Smoke)
LanguageData.Ammo_50mmType89MortarShell_Smoke.descrip: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
